Item.Description: The card reader device performed a self-test, and no errors occurred.
Default error code
Consumer timeout. The card was moved to the return position but was not removed withithe allotted time
Unable to retain the card. The card is not present in the card reader
Unable to write data to track 3. The card is not present in the card reader.
Unable to write data to track 1. The card is not present in the card reader.
Unable to write data to track 2. The card is not present in the card reader.
The card reader is unavailable or inoperative.
Self-test open failure. The card reader is not available.
Read operation is incomplete due to timeout or cancellation.Eject or retain command was rejected due to unsupported data type.
A card is jammed in the card reader. A possible fraud (fishing) attempt occurred.
Error is due to function command processing.Error is due to state processing
The operation cannot be performed due to improper network data. There is a format fault in state data or in Function Command message data.
Unable to write data to track 3 (state processing). The write fault limit in the device properties has been exceeded.
Unable to write data to track 1 (state processing). The write fault limit in the device properties has been exceeded.
Unable to write data to track 2 (state processing). The write fault limit in the device properties has been exceeded.
The read conditions cannot be satisfied (state processing). The read fault limit in the ACU has been exceeded.
The card retain bin is full. The card reader cannot retain the card. It might be possible to return the card.
The card is jammed in the card reader. The card cannot be returned to the consumer. It might be possible to retain the card.
Card reading performance has degraded to an unacceptable level. The dip card reader cannot reliably read track data.
A card is jammed in the card reader. A possible fraud attempt occurred
A card was partially inserted, rather than fully inserted (state processing). The partial insertion was repeated several times, or the card stayed partially inserted for a length of time.
An unsolicited card retain has occurred The card was present in the card reader on powerup The card was moved to the return position, but the consumer did not take the card within the allotted time.
Unable to write data to track 3 (function command processing).
Unable to write data to track 1 (function command processing).
Unable to write data to track 2 (function command processing).
The card was not retained. The card was removed from the card reader, the card was held by the user, or the card is jammed in the card reader.
The read conditions cannot be satisfied (function command processing).
The card is jammed in the card reader. The card cannot be returned to the consumer. It might be possible to retain the card.
Card tease. A card was inserted into the device but was not released by the consumer. The card was withdrawn from the device within 60 seconds
Card reading performance has degraded to an unacceptable level. The dip card reader cannot reliably read track data.
A card was partially inserted, rather than fully inserted (function command processing). The partial insertion was repeated several times, or the card stayed partially inserted for a length of time.
Rear Balance card tease. Card tease during rear insertion of the card for Rear Balance functions.
The status of the foreign device detection sensor has changed to OFF.A possible fraud attempt occurred. A foreign device, such as a skimmer, might have been removed from the card reader.
The status of the foreign device detection sensor has changed to ON.A possible fraud attempt occurred. A foreign device, such as a skimmer, might have been placed on or into the card reader.
card retain
No error
The dispenser returned garbled status. No retry is attempted.
Network error
Supply is low. Denomination A
Supply is low. Denomination B
Supply is low. Denomination C
Supply is low. Denomination D
Supply is low. Denomination E
Supply is low. Denomination F
Supply is low. Denomination G
Supply is low. Denomination H
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is reset device and the reason code is invalid command
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is reset device and the reason code is command received out of sequence
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is reset device and the reason code is buffer overflow
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is reset device and the reason code is device ID incorrect
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is reset device and the reason code is denomination error
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is reset device and the reason code is dispense data invalid
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is idle device and the reason code is invalid command
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is idle device and the reason code is command received out of sequence
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is idle device and the reason code is buffer overflow
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is idle device and the reason code is device ID incorrect
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is idle device and the reason code is denomination error
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is idle device and the reason code is dispense data invalid
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is and the reason code is invalid command
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is return device configuration data and the reason code is command received out of sequence
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is return device configuration data and the reason code is buffer overflow
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is return device configuration data and the reason code is device ID incorrect
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is return device configuration data and the reason code is denomination error
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is return device configuration data and the reason code is dispense data invalid
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is return device configuration data and the reason code is invalid command
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is return device CRCs and the reason code is command received out of sequence
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is return device CRCs and the reason code is buffer overflow
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is return device CRCs and the reason code is device ID incorrect
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is return device CRCs and the reason code is denomination error
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is return device CRCs and the reason code is dispense data invalid
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is purge mechanism and the reason code is invalid command
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is purge mechanism and the reason code is command received out of sequence
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is purge mechanism and the reason code is buffer overflow
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is purge mechanism and the reason code is device ID incorrect
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is purge mechanism and the reason code is denomination error
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is purge mechanism and the reason code is dispense data invalid
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is dispense and the reason code is invalid command
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is dispense and the reason code is command received out of sequence
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is dispense and the reason code is buffer overflow
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is dispense and the reason code is device ID incorrect
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is dispense and the reason code is denomination error
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is dispense and the reason code is dispense data invalid
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is purge notes and the reason code is invalid command
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is purge notes and the reason code is command received out of sequence
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is purge notes and the reason code is buffer overflow
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is purge notes and the reason code is device ID incorrect
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is purge notes and the reason code is denomination error
A dispenser command reject.The command rejected is purge notes and the reason code is dispense data invalid
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is test dispense and the reason code is invalid command
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is test dispense and the reason code is command received out of sequence
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is test dispense and the reason code is dispense data invalid
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is operate motor and the reason code is invalid command
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is operate motor and the reason code is command received out of sequence
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is operate motor and the reason code is dispense data invalid
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is operate diverter and the reason code is invalid command
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is operate diverter and the reason code is command received out of sequence
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is operate diverter and the reason code is dispense data invalid
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is adjust double detect and the reason code is invalid command
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is adjust double detect and the reason code is command received out of sequence
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is adjust double detect and the reason code is dispense data invalid
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is last dispense data dump and the reason code is invalid command
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is last dispense data dump and the reason code is command received out of sequence
A dispenser command reject while in the diagnostics mode.The command rejected is last dispense data dump and the reason code is dispense data invalid
ExpressBus communications problem. Notes may or may not have been dispensed
Dispenser shutdown (broken). This fault is caused by a previous fault occurrence (probably a jam not being physically cleared at the ATM and not entering Supply mode and running a test dispense.)
The drawer sensor is blocked prior to more than three consecutive dispenses.
The drawer sensor is not blocked after three consecutive dispenses. The status is first reported prior to the fourth dispense attempt
The drawer sensor is blocked after a power fail or the sensor is clear after previous but blocked before the current dispense
The drawer sensor is blocked leaving the Supply mode or fascia diagnostic routine
RAM error. No retry is attempted.
An unsolicited note from feed module 1. The retry option is disabled or the dispense recovery preceding the retry failed
An unsolicited note from feed module 2. The retry option is disabled or the dispense recovery preceding the retry failed
An unsolicited note from feed module 3. The retry option is disabled or the dispense recovery preceding the retry failed
An unsolicited note from feed module 4. The retry option is disabled or the dispense recovery preceding the retry failed

An unsolicited note from feed module 1 as reported by the dispenser. This status is converted before being sent to the network to either :3F:30:31 if the retry is attempted but resulted in the same fault, or :3A:30:31 if otherwise. See DI01:3F:30:31 or DI01:3A:30:31 for further status processing.

An unsolicited note from feed module 2 as reported by the dispenser. This status is converted before being sent to the network to either :3F:30:32 if the retry is attempted but resulted in the same fault, or :3A:30:32 if otherwise. See DI01:3F:30:32 or DI01:3A:30:32 for further status processing

An unsolicited note from feed module 3 as reported by the dispenser. This status is converted before being sent to the network to either :3F:30:33 if the retry is attempted but resulted in the same fault, or :3A:30:33 if otherwise. See DI01:3F:30:33 or DI01:3A:30:33 for further status processing

An unsolicited note from feed module 4 as reported by the dispenser. This status is converted before being sent to the network to either :3F:30:34 if the retry is attempted but resulted in the same fault, or :3A:30:34 if otherwise. See DI01:3F:30:34 or DI01:3A:30:34 for further status processing
An unsolicited note from feed module 1 as reported by the dispenser.
An unsolicited note from feed module 2 as reported by the dispenser.
An unsolicited note from feed module 3 as reported by the dispenser.
An unsolicited note from feed module 4 as reported by the dispenser.
The diverter does not go to reject during the dispense operation. The retry option is disabled or the dispense recovery preceding the retry failed.
A timing wheel error. The retry option is disabled or the dispense recovery preceding the retry failed
A purge error following a dispense as reported by the dispenser.

The counting sensor is blocked. The possible dispense operation completion is as follows: 1) The retry option is disabled or the dispense recovery preceding the retry failed. No retry is attempted. 2) The retry is attempted but resulted in the same faul
A RAM error as reported by the dispenser. No retry is attempted
The diverter does not energize prior to a dispense operation
A jam between double detect and exit. The retry is attempted but resulted in the same faul
Too many notes are dispensed as reported by the dispenser
A timing wheel or dispense purge error. If there is no corresponding DAL status
A purge failure. No retry is attempted.
A dispense timeout.
A dispense timeout as reported by the dispenser.
The supply is out. Denomination A
The supply is out. Denomination B
The supply is out. Denomination C
The supply is out. Denomination D
The supply is out. Denomination E
The supply is out. Denomination F
The supply is out. Denomination G
The supply is out. Denomination H
A feed failure from feed module 1 as reported by the dispenser
A feed failure from feed module 2 as reported by the dispenser
A feed failure from feed module 3 as reported by the dispenser
A feed failure from feed module 4 as reported by the dispenser
A command reject while the terminal is inservice due to a command reject sent from the dispenser
An unidentified cassette code as reported by the dispenser
The bill size does not match the cassette coding
The feed module 1 notes are thicker than the key data as reported by the dispenser
The feed module 2 notes are thicker than the key data as reported by the dispenser
The feed module 3 notes are thicker than the key data as reported by the dispenser
The feed module 4 notes are thicker than the key data as reported by the dispenser
Feed module 1 notes are shorter than the key data as reported by the dispenser
Feed module 2 notes are shorter than the key data as reported by the dispenser
Feed module 3 notes are shorter than the key data as reported by the dispenser
Feed module 4 notes are shorter than the key data as reported by the dispenser
Feed module 1 notes are longer than the key data as reported by the dispenser
Feed module 2 notes are longer than the key data as reported by the dispenser
Feed module 3 notes are longer than the key data as reported by the dispenser
Feed module 4 notes are longer than the key data as reported by the dispenser
The divert cassette is near full.
The divert cassette is full.
The divert cassette is missing
The retract cassette is near full.
The cassettes are shuffled as reported by the dispenser
The retract cassette is full.
The retract cassette is missing
Network error，If this status is received during a opcommanded self-test, the device was specifically requested to do a self-test but was not enabled or present
The door is open before the dispense
Attempted a dispense with the chest door open
Attempted a dispense with one or more service cassettes installed
A self-test was performed with a service cassette installed
A Dispense Test diagnostic ran without service cassettes installed on a non-presenter unit.
A dispense was attempted after currency that had been presented was not removed. This status only appears if the no retracts feature was selected.
A jam failure from feed module 1 as reported by the dispenser
A jam failure from feed module 2 as reported by the dispenser
A jam failure from feed module 3 as reported by the dispenser
A jam failure from feed module 4 as reported by the dispenser
Cash unit 1 is empty or inoperative.
Cash unit 2 is empty or inoperative
Cash unit 3 is empty or inoperative
Cash unit 4 is empty or inoperative
A jam between double detect and reject
The counting sensor is blocked as reported by the dispense
A double detect fault from feed module 1 as reported by the dispenser.
A double detect fault from feed module 2 as reported by the dispenser.
A double detect fault from feed module 3 as reported by the dispenser.
A double detect fault from feed module 4 as reported by the dispenser.
The drawer sensor is blocked prior to dispensing the first, second, or third consecutive time
The drawer sensor is not blocked after the first, second, or third consecutive dispense operation
Too few notes are dispensed from feed module 1
Too few notes are dispensed from feed module 2
Too few notes are dispensed from feed module 3
Too few notes are dispensed from feed module 4
The counting sensor is dirty. No retry is attempted. This status is not reported to the network
Unable to dispense on feed module 1. Dispense completed on another feed module. No retry is attempted
Unable to dispense on feed module 2. Dispense completed on another feed module. No retry is attempted
Unable to dispense on feed module 3. Dispense completed on another feed module. No retry is attempted
Unable to dispense on feed module 4. Dispense completed on another feed module. No retry is attempted
This is a status received from a device indicating that a self-test was performed and no errors were found
No error
Consumer timeout. The consumer had access to the cash but did not take all of it
Money not removed.
Internal communications error
This status may appear because of one of the following: 1) The money tray does not move during the present. 2) This status also appears in diagnostics and indicates that there is no money to present.
A hardware error occurred during a dump operation.
The divert does not move during the purge
The cash was not presented to the customer but is in transport and may be vulnerable.
Exit shutter does not open during Restore
Exit shutter does not open during Retract.
A hardware error occurred during the dump operation.
The transport motor is locked in purge.
Bill sensor stuck clear during Present
The bill sensor stuck clear during the Restore.
The bill sensor is stuck clear during the purge
A hardware error occurred during the present operation. No bills were presented to the consumer.
Pushplate stepper clock timeout during a Retract
Pushplate stepper clock timeout during a purge
Pushplate sensor blocked during purge
Pushplate sensor failure during a Restore
Pushplate sensor failure during a purge
The cash cannot be presented to the consumer. (Some bills might have been presented to the consumer.)
The bills cannot be retracted and dumped. All the cash was taken.
The exit shutter does not close after the Restore.
The exit shutter will not close after the dump operation. The dump operation was not completed due to some obstruction at the exit shutter
The terminal attempted to perform an illegal operation
The bill sensor is jammed during the Retract
The bill sensor is jammed during the purge
The forgotten cash has been removed.
The cash cannot be presented to the consumer. There are no bills to present
The bills cannot be retracted and dumped. All the cash was taken.
One or more bills have been dumped. The last two digits of the status indicated the number of bills dumped.
No error
Consumer Timeout
Consumer cancel
Command reject
Communications problem with device.
The device application is not responding.
The shutter would not open
Hardware error
The shutter would not close.
Reject cassette(s) are full at the end of the operation. The operation completed successfully
Reject cassette(s) are full at the beginning of the operation. The operation was not started.
Reject cassette is absent
The operation could not be performed due to improper network command data. There is a state or function format error
Error in loading buffers for the cash deposit
Cash retracted during the close state
There is no cash in the cash pocket when the cash verify operation was attempted
There is no cash in escrow when the cash return operation was attempted.
There were one or more bills rejected during the cash verification
The currency acceptor escrow stacker limit was exceeded. The consumer inserted more bills than the device could escrow.
There is a cash position error in the cash pocket or cash pocket stack limit has been exceeded.
All bills were rejected during the cash verification
Bill reject limit reached, no bills verified
Bill reject limit reached, some bills verified
Cash retracted during a clear cash operation
Cash retracted during a deposit operation
Cassette shuffle
The device is not in the proper mode to accept the network command requested. The command is out of sequence or the CAS mode is active.
An unexpected or unknown fault was returned from the currency acceptor.
Possible incomplete deposit. Both switches are blocked at the end of the deposit
Device timeout. No deposit after 15 minutes
Possible incomplete deposit. Both switches are blocked at the end of the deposit
Unsupported command or invalid data(internal error)
Configuration data status (34) with the data to follow (31:30).
Internal communications error
Jam at the front switch at the beginning and end of the transaction. The rear switch is activated in the normal manner. There is a possible broken front switch
Jam at the rear switch at the beginning and end of the transaction. The front switch is activated in the normal manner. There is a possible broken rear switch
Jam at the rear switch at the end of the transaction. The front switch is activated in the normal manner. There is a possible broken rear switch
The deposit gate is jammed open.
The deposit cassette is nearly full
The deposit cassette is full.
The deposit cassette is inoperative.
The deposit cassette is absent
During a self-test this status message indicates that the switches are blocked
Jam at the front switch at the beginning and end of the transaction. The rear switch is not activated
Jam at the front switch at the beginning and end of the transaction. The rear switch is activated in the normal manner. There is a possible broken front switch
Jam at the front switch at the end of the transaction. The rear switch is not activated
Jam at the front switch at the end of the transaction. The rear switch is activated in the normal manner. There is a possible broken front switch

Soft fault, device cannot operate / no errors. The front switch was closed and the rear switch was open at completion (not a normal finish). The front switch was closed and the rear switch was closed at the beginning (a normal entry).
Soft fault, device cannot operate/ no errors. Front and rear switches were closed at completion (a normal finish). The front and rear switches were open at the beginning (not a normal entry).

Soft fault, device cannot operate / no errors. The front and rear switches are closed at completion (a normal finish). The front switch was open and the rear switch was closed at the beginning (not a normal entry)
The deposit gate did not open.
An envelope is jammed in the transport or is present in the transport.
Jam at the front switch at the beginning and both switches at the end of the transaction

Soft fault, device cannot operate / envelope detect, gate switch fault. The front and rear switches were open at completion (not a normal finish). The front was closed and the rear switch was open at the beginning (not a normal entry). Neither switch changed status
Jam at the rear switch at the beginning and both switches at the end of the transaction
Jam at both switches at the end of the transaction.
Jam at the front switch at the beginning and end of the transaction. The rear switch is not activated
Jam at the front switch at the end of the transaction. The rear switch is activated in the normal manner. There is a possible broken front switch
Jam at the rear switch at the beginning and the end of the transaction. The front switch is not activated
Jam at the rear switch at the end of the transaction. The front switch is not activated
Gate is jammed open. Neither the front nor rear switch is activated
Jam at the front switch at the beginning and end of the transaction. The rear switch is not activated
Jam at both switches at the end of the transaction
Jam at front switch at the beginning and end of the transaction. The rear switch is not activated
Jam at the front switch at the beginning and end of the transaction. The rear switch is activated in the normal manner. There is a possible broken front switch
Jam at the front switch at the end of the transaction. Rear switch is not activated
Jam at the front switch at the end of the transaction. The rear switch is activated in the normal manner. There is a possible broken front switch
Jam at the front switch at the beginning and end of the transaction. The rear switch is not activated
Jam at the front switch at the beginning and end of the transaction. The rear switch is activated in the normal manner. There is a possible broken front switch
Jam at the front switch at the end of the transaction. The rear switch is activated in the normal manner. Possible broken front switch
The deposit gate is jammed open
Deposit printer is inoperative
Printer error. The XFS SP has reported an unspecified problem with the depository printer.
Gate error. The XFS SP has reported an unspecified problem with the deposit gate.
Transport error. The XFS SP has reported an unspecified problem with the depository transport.
The envelope is the wrong size
Ink Low Status
Reject of Deposit Envelope command
Reject of Document Accept command
Reject of deposit document (Escrow to Cassette) command
Reject of return document command

Communications problem
Depositor is disabled due to a fault condition
Depositor is disabled by the network.
Depositor is disabled due to a fault condition and the network
One or more document sensors are blocked. The document is jammed, or there is a defective sensor.
Bin mechanism failure during a document retain.
The scanner image buffer is not allocated by the device driver or the device driver is not installed. (not applicable for Opteva terminals)
PCISCAN.SYS device driver could not find the PCI Scanner card. (not applicable for Opteva terminals)
PCI Scanner card configuration error. (not applicable for Opteva terminals)
Character recognition is not available
Image Processor internal fault.
Image Processor not responding.
Buffer allocation failed
Document image display request failed
Video rejected image icon
Image icon storage failed.
Scan operation failed.
The front sensors(s) never became blocked while attempting to return a check to a consumer
Image Processor communication error
RSS software exception. XX is the code indicating the software exception module.
No MICR data is detected on the check. The MICR fault limit is reached. This fault will only occur during a deposit state.
Multiple failures to locate RSS window data.
PLD failure during reset.
Bin mechanism failure during reset
Gate mechanism failure during reset.
Scanner not latched during reset.
Printer not latched during reset.
Printer failure during reset.
PLD failure during envelope deposit.
Bin mechansim failure duiring envelope deposit
Gate failure during envelope deposit.
Printer failure during an envelope deposit
Bin mechanismfailure during a check deposit.
Gate failure during a check deposit.
Scanner not latched during a check deposit.
Printer not latched during a check deposit.
Printer failure during a check deposit.
Printer failure during a deposit
Gate mechanism failure during a document return
Printer failure during a document return.
Scanner hardware error
Scanner init error
Scanner host error
Scanner interface error
If this status is received during an op- commanded selftest, the device was specifically requested to do a self-test but was not enabled or present
No MICR data is detected on the check
Abnormal document retain. A document was either jammed in the IDM or abandoned by the transaction sequence and retained into the Deposit Cassette during the close state.
The document that was inserted was not a check. It could be too short or too long.
Scan error
Document jam or b bin full during retain operation
Recognition software error.
Display image error
Generate display fault.RAW_IMAGE_TOO_SMALL
Generate display fault.IMAGE_LENGTH_LT_MINIMUM
Generate display fault.IMAGE_WIDTH_LT_MINIMUM
Generate display fault.FAIL_TO_FIND_LEADING_EDGE
Generate display fault.FAIL_TO_FIND_TRAILING_EDGE
Generate display fault.FAIL_TO_FIND_LEFT_EDGE
Generate display fault.FAIL_TO_FIND_RIGHT_EDGE
Generate display fault.DISPLAY_BUFFER_GT_MAX
Generate display fault.DISPLAY_BUFFER_TOO_SMALL
Generate display fault. ORIENTATION_PARM_NOT_VALID
Generate display fault.RESOURCE_MALLOC_FAILURE
Generate display fault.Deskew Move it Error
Generate display fault.RESOURCE_MALLOC_FAILURE. Deskew Process Error
Image operation error.No template size match to document image
Image operation error.IP has no image present
Scanner operationalerror.
Kernal mismatch
RAM manager access failed
Document jam or b bin full during retain operation.
The deposit bin has been closed.
The deposit bin has been opened.
Transport jam
Transport jammed and shutter jammed open
Transport jammed and shutter jammed closed
No error
Default error code / event code
Consumer timeout. The receipt was presented to the consumer, but the consumer did not take the receipt
Supply of paper is running low
The receipt printer rejected a command.
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command(reset device) within the allotted time..
The receipt printer detected a print head unlocked error and has failed to complete the operation.
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (idle device) within the allotted time
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (return device configuration data) within the allotted time.
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (return device ROM CRCs) within the allotted time.
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (print on device) within the allotted time
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (move to top of form, burst and deliver form) within the allotted time.
During the initialization of the receipt printer, the printer responded to a command (reset device) with an invalid completion status.
During the initialization of the receipt printer, the printer responded to a command (return device configuration data) with an invalid completion status
During the initialization of the receipt printer, the printer responded to a command (return device ROM CRCs) with an invalid completion status.
The receipt printer is not communicating with Agilis 91x.
The receipt printer is not communicating with Agilis 91x.
The receipt printer failed to initialize.
Internal communications error
Hardware error
The receipt printer detected voltage error and has failed to complete the operation
The receipt printer detected a print head unlocked error and has failed to complete the operation
Equipment fault
Supply of paper is running low. A hardware error might have occurred at the same time.
The receipt printer detected a print head unlocked error and low supplies. It has failed to complete the operation
Supply of paper has run out. A hardware error might have occurred at the same time
The receipt printer detected a print head unlocked error and supplies out. It has failed to complete the operation
The receipt printer detected a continuous top-of-form mark.
The receipt printer cannot detect a top-of-form mark
Transport entry sensor malfunction
The retain bin is full
The retain bin is full or jammed. This status corresponds to Statement Printer status SP01:3D:00:0D
Supply of paper has run out

1) Self-test failed (operational command processing). The receipt mprinter is not present or is not enabled. 2) Format error detected in the print data. The most likely cause is an incomplete control sequence or too much print data between line terminators (CR or LF)
Data error. The data error status could be the result of incorrect print data, an incorrect software device configuration, or a problem with XFS forms and media definitions
Continuous Availability spool file error (too many open files).
Continuous Availability spool file error (access denied)
Continuous Availability spool file error (not enough memory)
Continuous Availability spool file error (sharing violation).
Continuous Availability spool file error (disk full).
The ribbon cartridge is missing. This status corresponds to Statement Printer status SP01:3E:00:06
There is a delivery module positioning fault. There may be a paper jam in the delivery module. This status corresponds to Statement Printer status SP01:3E:00:07
There may be a paper jam in the delivery module. This status corresponds to Statement Printer status SP01:3E:00:0A
The cutter has failed or the paper is out. This status corresponds to Statement Printer status SP01:3A:00:0E.

Data error. A paper supply low condition occurred at the same time. The data error status could be the result of incorrect print data, an incorrect software device configuration, or a problem with XFS forms and media definitions

Data error. A paper supply out condition occurred at the same time. The data error status could be the result of incorrect print data, an incorrect software device configuration, or a problem with XFS forms and media definitions.
The receipt printer detected a print head overheat error and has failed to complete the operation
Dump error. The receipt might not have been dumped.
Paper jam
Deliver error. The receipt might not have been delivered to the consumer
Cut error. The receipt might not have been delivered to the consumer.
The receipt printer detected a print head overheat error and low supplies. It has failed to complete the operation
Dump error. The receipt might not have been dumped. A paper supply low condition occurred at the same time
Paper jam. A paper supply low condition occurred at the same time
Deliver error. The receipt might not have been delivered to the consumer A paper supply low condition occurred at the same time
Cut error. The receipt might not have been delivered to the consumer. A paper supply low condition occurred at the same time
The receipt printer detected a print head overheat error and supplies out. It has failed to complete the operation
Dump error. The receipt might not have been dumped. A paper supply out condition occurred at the same time
Paper jam. A paper supply out condition occurred at the same time
Deliver error. The receipt might not have been delivered to the consumer. A paper supply out condition occurred at the same time.
Cut error. The receipt might not have been delivered to the consumer. A paper supply out condition occurred at the same time

A document was not found during the presentation attempt. There is a possible sequence error, paper jam in the delivery module, orsensor failure. This status corresponds to Statement Printer status SP01:3F:00:08
Corrupted print data

Difficulty locating the top-ofform marks on the paper. The receipt printer settings may not match the actual form. The form lengths may be incorrectly cut. This status corresponds to Statement Printer status SP01:3F:00:0
The midway sensor is not operating. This status corresponds to Statement Printer status SP01:3F:00:0F

Document not found during retain operation. Possible jam or sequence error caused by consumer removing jam. This fault may be sent as part of a terminal software attempt to automatically clear a sequence fault. This message corresponds to Statement Printer status SP01:3F:00:10
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (reset device) within the allotted time
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (idle device) within the allotted time
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (return device configuration data) within the allotted time.e
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (return device ROM CRCs) within the allotted time
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (print on device) within the allotted time
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (enable paper advance button on the receipt printer) within the allotted time.
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (burst and deliver form) within the allotted time
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (move to top of form, burst and deliver form) within the allotted time.
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (retain form) within the allotted time.
The receipt printer failed to respond to a command (dump form) within the allotted time
There is no receipt for the receipt printer to deliver. The receipt printer might have attempted a deliver operation before performing a print operation

There is no receipt for the receipt printer to retain. The consumer might have taken the receipt before the receipt printer could retain it, or the receipt printer might have attempted a retain operation before performing a print operation.
Unexpected or unknown fault
A document retain command was automatically done. The presented documents have been retained
A document dump was performed automatically

Head jam
Paper out

Printer open

Default error code / event code

Key storage error
Crypto hardware error
Internal EPP firmware error
EPP key management failure
A battery low or alarm status
Unknown option
Unsupported command
Unauthorized command
Invalid data
Sequence error. There is no PIN.
Data area is full (out of memory)
Invalid key usage
Invalid key. An attempt was made to use a nonexistent key or a key with an invalid ID
PIN formatting failure (format not supported) or PIN length error
User error. The device is inoperable because a person is preventing proper operationr
Certificate check failed (invalid certification state or invalid format)
No error
Default error code / event code
No error
Default error code / event code
Ambush detector ON, burglary sensor OFF, safe door OPEN
Ambush detector ON, burglary sensor OFF, safe door CLOSED
Ambush detector ON, burglary sensor ON, safe door OPEN
Ambush detector ON, burglary sensor ON, safe door CLOSED
